useCases.title: Mandaps concept brief
useCases.summary: Build a controlled preview brief for Lotus canopy options with local assets, status labels, and screen references.
steps: Select Lotus canopy and Temple dome candidates from the local asset set.
Attach one reference board, one route screen, and one asset preview screen.
Mark live procurement, certification, and provider data as external when evidence is missing.
Hand off the brief to the planning route with asset IDs preserved.
blockedNotes: Preview geometry only; structural validation remains BLOCKED.
Demo data uses local preview assets and screens only; live provider state remains blocked until backed by evidence.

useCases.title: Mandaps CAD placement review
useCases.summary: Place mandaps assets into the CAD planning flow for scale, route fit, and scene-level review.
steps: Use the mandap primitive as the local preview geometry anchor.
Review width, depth, height, and material tags before scene insertion.
Compare the CAD/editor screen with the category reference board.
Keep structural, electrical, fire, or vendor validation blocked unless evidence exists.
blockedNotes: Preview geometry only; structural validation remains BLOCKED.
Demo data uses local preview assets and screens only; live provider state remains blocked until backed by evidence.

useCases.title: Mandaps budget package
useCases.summary: Prepare a budget-ready option set for mandaps without implying live checkout or vendor confirmation.
steps: Group three local preview assets into a buyer-facing package.
Use cost ranges as demo estimates, not confirmed quotes.
Attach screens for budget, asset, and board review surfaces.
Retain blocked payment and marketplace commerce notes where relevant.
blockedNotes: Preview geometry only; structural validation remains BLOCKED.
Demo data uses local preview assets and screens only; live provider state remains blocked until backed by evidence.

useCases.title: Mandaps production handoff
useCases.summary: Convert the demo package into a production checklist with explicit blockers and evidence references for mandaps.
steps: Move selected local assets into a production checklist.
Attach route, board, and observatory screens for review.
Separate preview-ready tasks from production-only external validations.
Leave the final signoff blocked until authority, engineering, or provider evidence is attached.
blockedNotes: Preview geometry only; structural validation remains BLOCKED.
Demo data uses local preview assets and screens only; live provider state remains blocked until backed by evidence.
